hero.title: Immerse yourself in the symphony of Quang Binh's wild mountains
hero.subtitle: Discover absolute serenity at the heart of a world natural heritage site, where minimalist architecture meets the majesty of limestone karst.

story.label: Living Spaces
story.title: An Experience Amid the Green Wilderness
story.description: Every villa at Zenith Wilderness is designed as part of the ecosystem. We use sustainable local materials paired with solar panels to minimize our environmental footprint while still delivering modern luxury.
story.imageCaptionDesc: Wake up wrapped in mountain mist, with birdsong echoing from the primeval forest.

features.title: Eco-Conscious Architecture
features.desc: Built with natural stone and sustainably farmed timber.

features.title: Natural Ventilation
features.desc: Open-air design invites forest breeze and daylight to the fullest.

rooms.label: Stay
rooms.title: Rooms & Bungalows
rooms.subtitle: Choose the retreat that fits your journey of exploration.

items.name: Forest View Bungalow
items.desc: A standalone timber bungalow facing the primeval forest, with a private balcony for morning sun.

items.name: Karst Valley Suite
items.desc: A spacious suite with floor-to-ceiling glass overlooking the misty limestone valley.

items.name: Riverside Villa
items.desc: A private riverside villa with its own garden and outdoor soaking tub.

items.name: Cave Explorer Family Room
items.desc: A generous family room close to the trailheads leading into the cave trekking routes.

items.title: High-Speed Wifi
items.desc: Reliable coverage across the property, even deep in the mountains.

items.title: Private Parking
items.desc: Secure parking right on the villa grounds.

items.title: Kitchen & Local Breakfast
items.desc: Organic ingredients with a daily farm-to-table menu.

items.title: Private Trekking Guide
items.desc: Hidden trails through the deep forest, reserved for our guests.

items.title: 24/7 Security
items.desc: On-site staff and security around the clock for total privacy.

items.title: Limestone Karst Views
items.desc: Every room opens onto the majestic karst scenery of Phong Nha.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Genuine stories from journeys exploring Phong Nha with Zenith Wilderness.

items.quote: Absolutely stunning setting — waking up to mist over the limestone peaks. The trekking team was professional and attentive.
items.name: Hoang Anh

items.quote: Secluded and completely quiet, yet still close to central Phong Nha. The local breakfast was delicious with fresh, clean ingredients.
items.name: Minh Thu

items.quote: My first trek through primeval forest with the villa's guide — the most memorable experience of my whole Quang Binh trip.
items.name: Duc Anh

contact.title: A Storied Location
contact.subtitle: Just 15 minutes' drive from central Phong Nha, the villa sits in a secluded spot that guarantees total privacy while staying convenient for visiting the famous caves.
contact.address: Son Trach, Bo Trach, Quang Binh

footer.tagline: Rediscover peace amid the nature of Phong Nha.
